mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders o JOIN customer c ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id WHERE o.business_id = #{businessId} AND o.payment_status = 'PAID' AND o.accept_status = 'ACCEPTED' AND o.bid_id IS NOT NULL
AND ( c.nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search.keyword}, '%') OR o.order_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search.keyword}, '%') OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM bids b JOIN request r ON r.request_id = b.request_id WHERE b.bid_id = o.bid_id AND r.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search.keyword}, '%') ) )
AND o.created_at >= #{search.startDate}
AND o.created_at < DATE_ADD(#{search.endDate}, INTERVAL 1 DAY)

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders o JOIN customer c ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id WHERE o.payment_status = 'PAID' AND o.bid_id IS NOT NULL
AND ( c.nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search.keyword}, '%') OR o.order_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search.keyword}, '%') OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM bids b JOIN request r ON r.request_id = b.request_id WHERE b.bid_id = o.bid_id AND r.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search.keyword}, '%') ) )
AND o.created_at >= #{search.startDate}
AND o.created_at < DATE_ADD(#{search.endDate}, INTERVAL 1 DAY)

SELECT o.order_id, o.order_no, o.business_id, o.bid_id, o.total_amount, o.payment_status, o.delivery_status, o.accept_status, o.due_date, o.created_at, o.customer_id, c.nickname AS customer_nickname, cr.room_id FROM orders o JOIN customer c ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id LEFT JOIN chat_room cr ON cr.bid_id = o.bid_id AND cr.business_id = o.business_id AND cr.customer_id = o.customer_id WHERE o.business_id = #{businessId} AND o.payment_status = 'PAID' AND o.accept_status = 'PENDING' AND o.bid_id IS NOT NULL ORDER BY o.created_at DESC

SELECT o.order_id, o.order_no, o.business_id, o.bid_id, o.total_amount, o.payment_status, o.delivery_status, o.accept_status, o.due_date, o.created_at, o.customer_id, c.nickname AS customer_nickname, cr.room_id FROM orders o JOIN customer c ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id LEFT JOIN chat_room cr ON cr.bid_id = o.bid_id AND cr.business_id = o.business_id AND cr.customer_id = o.customer_id WHERE o.payment_status = 'PAID' AND o.accept_status = 'PENDING' AND o.bid_id IS NOT NULL ORDER BY o.created_at DESC

SELECT o.order_id, o.order_no, o.business_id, o.bid_id, o.total_amount, o.payment_status, o.delivery_status, o.accept_status, o.due_date, o.created_at, o.customer_id, c.nickname AS customer_nickname, cr.room_id FROM orders o JOIN customer c ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id LEFT JOIN chat_room cr ON cr.bid_id = o.bid_id AND cr.business_id = o.business_id AND cr.customer_id = o.customer_id WHERE o.order_id = #{orderId}

SELECT oi.order_item_id, oi.kit_id, oi.quantity, oi.price, COALESCE(k.name, r.title, '개인거래 상품') AS product_name, COALESCE(k.main_image1, NULL) AS image_url FROM order_items oi LEFT JOIN kit k ON k.kit_id = oi.kit_id LEFT JOIN orders o ON o.order_id = oi.order_id LEFT JOIN bids b ON b.bid_id = o.bid_id LEFT JOIN request r ON r.request_id = b.request_id WHERE oi.order_id = #{orderId}

SELECT o.order_id, o.order_no, o.business_id, o.bid_id, o.total_amount, o.payment_status, o.delivery_status, o.accept_status, o.due_date, o.created_at, o.customer_id, c.nickname AS customer_nickname, cr.room_id FROM orders o JOIN customer c ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id LEFT JOIN chat_room cr ON cr.bid_id = o.bid_id AND cr.business_id = o.business_id AND cr.customer_id = o.customer_id WHERE o.business_id = #{businessId} AND o.payment_status = 'PAID' AND o.bid_id IS NOT NULL ORDER BY o.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders o WHERE o.business_id = #{businessId} AND o.payment_status = 'PAID' AND o.bid_id IS NOT NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_room (bid_id, customer_id, business_id) VALUES (#{bidId}, #{customerId}, #{businessId})
INSERT INTO chat_function (room_id, business_id, customer_id) VALUES (#{roomId}, #{businessId}, #{customerId})
mapper.update: UPDATE orders SET delivery_status = #{deliveryStatus} WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
UPDATE orders SET accept_status = #{acceptStatus} WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
